steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is B, ${x}^{4}+17{x}^{2}+48$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Expand each part
steps.content: First, $$(x^2+8)^2=x^4+16x^2+64.$$ Also, $$(x-4)(x+4)=x^2-16$$ by difference of squares.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Adding the two parts gives $$x^4+16x^2+64+x^2-16=x^4+17x^2+48.$$ This matches, so B is correct. The missing odd-power terms are expected because both parts create only even powers and constants.
